name: Prince Srivari Vidyalaya - Madipakkam

address.Address: 12, Kannagi Cross St, Puzhuthivakkam, Madipakkam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600091, India

address.streetAddress: 12, Kannagi Cross St, Puzhuthivakkam, Madipakkam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600091, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: I have good regard with this school.  But the way principal madam behaved is not good.  Parents are ignored.  And I preferred to join my son into Sai ram school become of their rude behaviour

One of the worst management experience the student and their parents could have.
The principal has no human ethics he never respects the parents and he always be soo arrogant towards the parents who come to meet them.
I don't think any student can go study with this poor ethical management.
I will not recommend anyone to join this school

Such an horrible and atrocious school where my cousin tried to reach out to them for her kid's admission for class 2 - the kid was studied in a Govt school and when these people went for admission in their school today after knowing that this kid studied in a Govt school they threw the application form literally and harshly said there is no place for govt school children..  Is it a crime to study in a govt school? Why such a stupid gesture from the place to teach all the children are meant to be same and there is no difference in any means! Never wanted to be in the school even if they offer admission for my kid! Want to give zero stars - but couldn't have that option

Please think before admitting your children in this school.

This school is known for its discipline & punctuality previously but it is moving away from it slowly. There is no importance given to extra curricular activities & sports, Fees are comparatively lesser than other schools, but they collect fees in cash only when even a road side vendor now accepts digital payments. The school is situated in the middle of residential location in a narrow street, and the management is keen on expanding the number of schools in that location which is not at all a good thing. There is no parking space for the parents, vans & autos and they have to park their vehicle in the street itself which in turn creates nuisance for the residents there, School children from all the 5 big buildings, they enter and leave almost at the same times and people get stuck in the street and unable to move on a daily basis, this is a huge concern because during any disasters there is a high chance of stampede. As usual parents are not considered as human beings, you can very well see them standing on the road under scorching sun waiting eventhough they can be allowed inside to stand under shadow. All being said my kids are still studying there & I hope the management concentrates on safety of everyone and gives platform to students to showcase or improve their extra curricular & sports.

Best school in Madipakkam. With the best quality of education is provided to the students. Very well disciplined and all the students who come out of prince shrivari senior higher secondary school will be placed well in future. The teachers are the golden asset. All the staffs are well coperative. The ambiance of the school is top notch. The school has big stage for the students to shows their skills. They conduct science exhibition three years once. Which will be a treat to students to expose their talents. On the whole prince shrivari senior higher secondary school will be too in madipakkam.thanks to all the teachers and staff. Best class of CBSE education is provided
